items.title: Earnings live: Tesla stock falls after earnings miss, IBM sinks
items.description: Third quarter earnings season is ramping up, and analysts expect S&P 500 companies grew their profits by 8% during the quarter.

items.title: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES UPDATED BUSINESS SEGMENT STRUCTURE AHEAD OF AEROSPACE SPIN-OFF
items.description: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced its updated business segment structure ahead of the planned separation of its Aerospace Technologies business, expected in the second half of 2026, and its Solstice Advanced Materials business, expected to be completed on October 30, 2025.
